h84f6bf23gb354g4627ga24bg403eb4fe1671: Hey. Thanks for stepping between me and the kid.
hee62a91eg976bg4d9bg9988gfd359bf05b39: My mum gave me that amulet. But I think she'd be happy knowing the kid has it now.
hbb18ebccg7a14g4f4dga697gdb6b5061fce9: Good to be back behind the walls, have to say. For as long as that lasts.
ha1fe71cfg62fcg4cefg8fe7g1a3a7e0e9300: Not in the mood to talk right now. It ain't you, so leave it.
hd45da7ddgec7bg42b5gaff7gd8aafb1b1d49: Someone stole the damn amulet off me again. Don't want to talk about it.
h1ad4c93dga9b1g4dbfga60dg30057bb3c09d: You're all right by me, friend.
h27b33195g7b72g46d8ga60bg7650aab5131e: The nerve of that smirking little rat.
h416c6a4eg2f6bg4954ga7f2gf35d55d066f3: I'll say this for those devils: they know how to throw a punch.
hdc2bd201g1124g43f6ga5c3g779ed23a9d45: Can't believe the kid thought he could snatch my mum's locket and get away with it.
h6cab0805g285bg475dg8df6ged3153342c3b: Bet he's learned his lesson now.
hfc97582cg015bg4a0fga827ga7b47aca3fb0: Speaking of the locket... can I have it?
h48518f13gf750g4afega091g08f1ae7467af: Tell me you are, and this doesn't have to end in blood.
hbebf4096g42b1g41b0gb8acgfca33424a5ab: Quit whining, and give me the locket. It'll save me the effort of picking your pocket later.
hb88d0ef2gee68g4900g9265g461519f02f2c: If you don't want another beating, give me the locket. Now.
h03c617a5g4eefg4fccga732g4a0483e5c0bf: My mum gave me that locket on her godsdamned deathbed. The boy took the thing. I know it.
hae62fd1egaf29g436eg9bf6gbbde49a52eda: You mean this locket? How much is it worth to you?
hd2c936c4gc430g4e43g9683g6bcfc12650c6: How did you... all right, fine. I'll give you some coin for it.
h191bc85fgf6dbg4fceg835bgcfbadf21fad4: Forget the coin. The locket's yours. Take it.
h6f949ee9gf5c3g4622gae9bg2323bc0e9223: I... I don't know what to say.
h9d92b310g1781g46dcg9476g28d3d24bf0a3: On second thought, I quite like this bauble. Think I'll keep it for myself.
h24d88307g6decg45a7g841cg2156219979aa: It's gonna be hard to wear a necklace when you ain't got a neck. Give it back.
h37003698gb784g48adg8296g560b0161f212: 'Some coin'? Try 'lots of coin' - or else the trinket stays with me.
h2dec899bg570eg4939gb849g9b7e5cf34bab: Fine. I'll give you everything I've got and you can choke on it for all I care. Give me the amulet.
h132a0767g3471g43abg90b1ge417fb29dee5: And here's your reward. We're square now. Get lost.
h7e45f75bg7d36g4755ga184gea64a1593363: And it looks like someone took my money too. Got nothing to give you but my thanks.
hf728030cg3499g46f1ga32fgc851fc88308c: If that ain't enough, too bad. It's all I got.
hfde68e4dga083g4a65gb9a3g532f8eaffd22: On second thoughts, I'm keeping it.
h9cc29a25ge26cg497cga471g2552d660893c: That's it. That is bloody it.
ha623d03agf477g4dd5g8f54gfd6cde891599: Don't blame you for trying, but I gotta eat. Give me the amulet, I pay you fair, and we're square.
h9e0f1f39g6246g4b94gb95bg209d9962b269: Now hand it over, or we're gonna have problems, you and me.
he4895a45g4904g4564gb34ag64f44b425422: And here's your reward. We're square now. Get lost.
h92584e0ag7665g4f78gbfe1ga43c8778b61a: And it looks like someone took my money too. Got nothing to give you but my thanks.
h859597dcgb67ag4214g93a0g34cf9c6ede72: Then I guess we're going to have problems. Because I'm keeping it.
h96f45f85g1c40g4500ga236gc7e275cdfbc0: It's the last thing of mum's I have... it's worth everything to me.
hef6dee9fg77fag410eg8bc1g0b6ac76a2ee0: What're you waiting for? I told you I'd give you some coin. Hand it over!
h932ac1b7g95f5g4f2bga303gbc2bf0e6fef1: I think you can up your offer a little. It was a gift from your mother, after all.
h1da0fc35gc345g437aga701g8cbf27c3848c: W-what? Get your head outta my head!
h7b36af69g18c3g4bd5g9c34g41bc1662d7ca: Here's the locket. It's all yours.
h803cc41fgd172g4980gbe45g036d16e8cbd1: You found it? I... I don't know what to say.
h19c317d3g930cg4d29gbdcdgbcb8f4e38cec: I know it's stupid. It's all I have of her, is all.
ha91e0c9bgd988g4cb2g9e8cg1881797f262c: Kind of you, friend. Here's something for your troubles.
h28aae2d0g3c51g4e55ga832g7204de214f14: Heirloom, is it? Been in your family long?
h98c927e0g2f4cg4035gac32gdeea4edd8e12: Not much of an heirloom then... unless there's a tale behind it, maybe?
he9f8c2cfgc55fg47cbg82ecgbf2098abac18: She stole it from a house she cleaned, all right?
he6c3832ag30fcg4ef3g9cd8gbf13648187aa: They didn't pay her much. They owed her a perk or two.
h3863ce28g1398g4fe3gbcf0gc4bc768c5adb: Let me get this straight - you're annoyed that somebody stole your stolen property?
h040aefebgfce1g40efg93cdg96bee1412f0e: Ain't the same and you know it.
h26a3112eg85bcg4848gb1c3g5c96034cbc4d: Anyway, I meant what I said. Thanks for what you did. I gotta go.
h0bb4f309g9394g4a80gac30gffa56bd37cb9: Wherever it came from, at least it's something to remember her by.
h98c74997ge716g49acga5f2g8ac4b3da7185: Anyway, I should go. See you around.
h63f6eb4fg9166g4bdfg80feg3a6b57ccdb8c: I see. Your blessed mum was providing for her family, but the young tiefling is a thieving devil.
he006ab78gf2fbg4e5bgb9b0gb986210c7ac9: Never said she was an angel, did I? But she sure as hells didn't have horns on her head!
h2b4cf207gd7beg4e13g8d7bgb1bf9621834e: Nothing. I'm sad, is all. Leave it alone.
h2e7dbf98g6e5bg415dg9382ga4f39e2d59ab: Was in another family right up till Mum stole it. But it's mine now - all I have.
hc466703eg59c2g489ag94ebg1f8a4133d0f5: Let me guess - it wasn't your mother's to give you in the first place, was it?
h05757d7egf648g4c77gb24egf8871320800d: Come on, spit it out. What aren't you telling me about the locket?
h7372ee31g8b4bg4eb8ga440g59b764387412: Ugh. Get your head outta my head!
h3756fe86g069cg4a71g8437gee52696a19a7: I'll see about getting it back into your hands.
h7a277540g1371g463fg9ad5gfa4628b6acd8: Kind of you to offer, but that boy ain't giving it up, not even to one of his own. I'm sure of it.
hc965093fg84edg4e9egac80g76c5e1bed27a: And if you twist the pup's arm, he'll yelp, and the wolves'll come running.
h9f9cc55agd886g4697ga9c7g43c8dfae9d7f: Should've seen that, but my temper was up.
h8d7a4d99gbc9eg49b8g9f96gebc28c33df4a: I appreciate the kindness friend, but I ain't getting the locket back. Not now.
h673ef940g5521g42acg9393g6a29e552062b: Kind of you to offer, but that boy ain't giving it up. I'm sure of it.
h87afd267gfdefg48ffg9163g19e89ce1aa51: I'll say this for you devils: you know how to throw a punch.
h2f548cd8g1584g4654gae50gc6e464af60d6: Watch your bags, huh? Learn from my mistakes.
h182f2d21g054eg4308g8651g6fd1810a8c7a: Got a beating, thanks to you. But at least I got my locket back.
hd7c141a9gfd6ag400bgba9fg014b43ce4752: Thanks to you, that kid has my mum's locket and I got a beating.
hbdd47a31gb1e8g435fgadcbg3eb36a334558: Got nothing to say to you. You got nothing I want.
hdb67255bg3929g4b3egb467g510eac3ea158: Get out of my face. Got nothing to say to you.
ha9d259a7ga640g476bg8e8bgcaf3ae61d39b: Thanks to you, I almost lost my locket. My mum gave that to me on her deathbed.
h613cbb85ge401g4197g97c6gb146d3209eb9: Thanks to you, that kid has my locket. My mum gave that to me on her deathbed.
h0c5a5d01gd3adg4457gab19g9e69af7076c9: Get out of my face. Got nothing to say to you.
hff4d8997g5d0dg428ag81ecg958ccaca3c7f: That kid stole the one thing that means anything to me.
